response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and client-facing advisory roles, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical gap for this C1-required role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong mentorship and workshop experience demonstrating communication and teaching ability
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML expertise, architectural design documentation, or client advisory experience
Lacks documented experience in technical project management or operational oversight of multiple client projects
